principles.dry-humor: Wit is welcome. Punchlines are not required. If a sentence reads like it belongs in a quarterly report, fix it.
principles.systems-first: Lead with how the system works, then explain why. Operators want to understand before they trust.
principles.empathetic-toward-operators: Operators are running real businesses. Their stress is real. The product should feel like a competent colleague, not a cheerleader.
principles.sarcasm-rules: Sarcasm is allowed only when targeting broken logic, chaotic systems, or absurd industry norms. Never direct it at the user or their choices.
principles.no-em-dashes: Do not use em dashes (the — character, U+2014) or double hyphens (--) used as em dash substitutes. Use a comma, a period, or restructure the sentence.

tone-by-context.empty-states: Direct and useful. Explain what is missing and how to fix it. A little dry is fine.
tone-by-context.errors: State what happened, then state what to do. No blame, no drama.
tone-by-context.success-messages: Confirm the action. Keep it short. Resist adding exclamation points.
tone-by-context.onboarding: Walk through the system clearly. Assume the user is smart but new.
tone-by-context.tooltips: One sentence. Fact-first. Spare the metaphors.
tone-by-context.loading-states: Either show progress or say nothing. Avoid performative optimism like 'Almost there!'.

do: Name things by what they do
Acknowledge when something is complex without apologizing for it
Use second person (you, your) to address the user directly
do-not: Use exclamation points in error messages
Direct sarcasm at users or their decisions

empty-funnel.bad: No funnels yet! Get started by creating your first one!
empty-funnel.good: No funnels here. Add one to get the sequence going.

delete-confirm.bad: Are you sure? This cannot be undone!
delete-confirm.good: This will permanently delete the funnel and its steps. Confirm to continue.

integration-error.bad: Oops! Something went wrong connecting to your CRM.
integration-error.good: Connection failed. Check your API credentials and try again.
